vulnerability.reference: Sparse GNNs are deployed without adversarial evaluation on noisy real-world social graphs, enabling model fragility to unseen perturbations
vulnerability.generated: Analysts' trust in WL-expressivity-optimized sparse GNN performance without shift-validation leaves them blind to overfitting under noisy graph conditions.

impact.reference: Misclassified community roles lead to false accusations or biased content moderation, causing reputational harm and social unrest
impact.generated: False anomaly alerts and undetected malicious roles erode platform safety, enabling covert manipulation to spread unchecked across the social network.

dose_response.reference: Sparse GNNs encoding overfitted representations fail under structural noise, which when used by analysts without adversarial evaluation leads to misclassified roles and unfair moderation, causing social unrest.
dose_response.generated: Lottery ticket sparsification encoding overfitted WL-expressivity-optimized representations, through social network analysts using pruned GNNs for anomaly detection, triggers blind trust without shift-validation, leading to false anomaly alerts and undetected malicious roles eroding platform safety.
